Metadata.title: LAV PHARMA | Regulatory Pharmaceutical & Veterinary Services
Metadata.description: Experts in health registrations, distribution permits, and international regulatory affairs for the healthcare and veterinary sectors.

Hero.label: REGULATORY PHARMACEUTICAL & VETERINARY SERVICES
Hero.title: We bring your products to the global market
Hero.subtitle: Experts in health registrations and regulatory affairs for pharmaceutical and veterinary products. Your strategic partner for entering Latin America.

Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: Comprehensive regulatory solutions for pharmaceutical and veterinary products

genericos.title: Generic Medications
genericos.description: Health registration of generic medications with the regulatory authorities of each country.

sintesis.title: Chemical Synthesis
sintesis.description: Registration of chemical synthesis products, including technical documentation and stability studies.

vacunas.title: Vaccines
vacunas.description: Regulatory management for the registration of human and veterinary vaccines in Latin American markets.

biotecnologicos.title: Biotechnological
biotecnologicos.description: Registration of biotechnological products and biosimilars with specialized technical support.

bioequivalentes.title: Bioequivalent
bioequivalentes.description: Registration of bioequivalent medications, including management of bioequivalence studies.

holding.title: Regulatory Holding
holding.description: Legal representation and ownership of health registrations with authorities in each country.

almacenamiento.title: Warehousing
almacenamiento.description: Warehousing management in compliance with good distribution and storage practices.

permisos.title: Import Permits
permisos.description: Processing of import permits and licenses for pharmaceutical and veterinary products.

distribucion.title: Distribution
distribucion.description: Obtaining permits and licenses for the legal distribution of products in different markets.

asesoria.title: Regulatory Consulting
asesoria.description: Specialized consulting to facilitate product expansion into Latin American markets.

cumplimiento.title: Regulatory Compliance
cumplimiento.description: Ongoing support to ensure compliance with current health regulations.

International.title: International Reach
International.subtitle: We connect global manufacturers with the Latin American market through our regulatory expertise.

origin.title: Experience with Manufacturers from
origin.subtitle: We register products from manufacturers located in these countries, managing all necessary technical and regulatory documentation.

registration.title: Specialized in Registration across Latin America
registration.subtitle: We are your strategic partner for registering pharmaceutical and veterinary products in these markets.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To provide specialized services in the management, registration, and obtaining of permits for the distribution of medications, veterinary products, cosmetics, and health products, ensuring compliance with current health regulations.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To be a leading company in regulatory and health services, recognized for our efficiency, experience, and commitment to quality, becoming the preferred strategic partner for national and international healthcare and veterinary companies.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We act with honesty, transparency, and ethics in every process.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.description: We rigorously comply with health and legal regulations.

efficiency.title: Efficiency
efficiency.description: We optimize processes to deliver agile and timely solutions.

quality.title: Quality Commitment
quality.description: We pursue excellence in every service, ensuring precision.

confidentiality.title: Confidentiality
confidentiality.description: We protect our clients' information with total discretion.

clientFocus.title: Client Focus
clientFocus.description: We listen and provide personalized solutions for every need.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously improve to adapt to the regulatory environment.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.subtitle: We're ready to help with your regulatory needs.
